prompt: Sprite sheet for a children's game: 2x1 grid (two frames side by side), PURE WHITE #FFFFFF background, wide white margins, nothing touching the edges. The SAME cartoon character in both frames: a cute little girl pastry chef, brown bob hair, big white chef hat, white long-sleeved chef jacket, pink apron, dark gray pants, brown shoes, cute soft 3D-render storybook style. SIDE VIEW walking to the RIGHT in mid-stride. FRAME 1 (left): RIGHT leg stepping forward, LEFT arm swung forward. FRAME 2 (right): LEFT leg stepping forward, RIGHT arm swung forward. The two frames must be IDENTICAL in body size, head size, posture, camera angle and lighting - ONLY the legs and arms swap position, like two frames of the same walk cycle animation. Both feet lines on the same ground baseline. STRICTLY FORBIDDEN: any text, letters or numbers.

Background for a children's game: INSIDE of a cozy COOKIE SHOP, cute storybook cartoon (NOT photo), soft pastel colors: wooden counter with trays of chocolate-chip cookies, shelves of glass cookie jars, warm window light, wooden floor. Soft and slightly muted so game UI sits on top. STRICTLY FORBIDDEN: letters, words, numbers, people, characters. Landscape, fills the frame.
